title: Deck 1
description: This is the description for Deck 1.

cards.term: What is the capital of France?
cards.definition: The capital of France is Paris.

cards.term: What is the largest planet in our solar system?
cards.definition: The largest planet in our solar system is Jupiter.
'To Kill a Mockingbird' was written by Harper Lee.

cards.term: What is the chemical symbol for water?
cards.definition: The chemical symbol for water is H2O.
